div1.entryFree:
Triple, 1) threefold: by the t. Hecate's team, Mids. V, 391 (in allusion to her threefold character, --Luna in heaven, Diana on earth, and Hecate in the nether world). the t. crown (of the pope) H6B I, 3, 66.
2) third: which . . . he bade me store up as a t. eye, safer than mine own two, more dear, All's II, 1, 111. you shall see in him the t. pillar of the world transformed into a strumpet's fool, Ant. I, 1, 12.
